llm_eval.notes: 実read。frontmatter健全: kind:command, source #C09実在, allowed-tools=[Read,Bash,Skill], disable-model-invocation:false, argument-hintが全verb列挙。責務は薄いverb dispatcherに限定し全dispatch先が実在を確認: init/node/status/sync/spec/requirements/render/decompose→各run-dev-graph-*skill実在, next→run-dev-graph-schedule実在, plan→external run-system-dev-plan実在, worktree→scripts/manage-worktree-lease.py実在。worktree mapping table正確: 実scriptが--op(claim|heartbeat|park|release|list含む)/--graph-node-id/--branch/--session-id/--repo-rootを受理しpublic→canonical変換が一致, 許可opをclaim|heartbeat|park|release|listに制限。良い設計: dispatch前にresolve-repo-context.py --mode read実行(scriptに--mode read|write実在), 引数をshell文字列として再評価しない, 位置引数を正準flagへ一度だけ変換, 未知verb/依存不在/root不正で候補一覧返し近似実行しない fail-closed。planはid/digest不一致で停止。軽微: allowed-tools配列記法(他commandはinline)だが表記差のみで機能影響なし。CI lintで機械被覆済のためmechanical:true。
